testcase.name: doubleBooking_secondReserveSameSeat_fails
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: whenUserValidatesQrWithConfirmedReservation_thenActionCompletes
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-14T14:19:42.066+01:00 INFO 63954 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.train.booking.service.PricingService : Pricing via Drools: tripId=1 tier=ANYTIME price=10.00 2026-04-14T14:19:42.084+01:00 INFO 63954 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.t.b.service.PaymentGatewayService : Demo payment: reservation 2 marked PAID and CONFIRMED 2026-04-14T14:19:42.171+01:00 INFO 63954 --- [booking-service] [ main] o.d.c.kie.builder.impl.KieContainerImpl : Start creation of KieBase: defaultKieBase 2026-04-14T14:19:42.175+01:00 INFO 63954 --- [booking-service] [ main] o.d.c.kie.builder.impl.KieContainerImpl : End creation of KieBase: defaultKieBase 2026-04-14T14:19:42.189+01:00 INFO 63954 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.t.b.service.GeofenceRulesService : No ticket at entry: created StationEntryAction and notification for user 1 at Sheffield

testcase.name: whenUserEntersGeofenceWithoutTicket_thenPendingStationEntryActionIsCreated

testcase.name: paymentFlow_reserveThenDemoPayment_thenReservationIsConfirmed
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-14T14:19:43.575+01:00 INFO 63954 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.train.booking.service.PricingService : Pricing via Drools: tripId=2 tier=ANYTIME price=10.00 2026-04-14T14:19:43.585+01:00 INFO 63954 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.t.b.service.PaymentGatewayService : Demo payment: reservation 7 marked PAID and CONFIRMED
